---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## What I expected

What you expected to happen instead.

## How to reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. `python ...`
2. With query: `"..."`
3. See error / wrong result

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04 / macOS 14]
- Python version: `python --version`
- Branch / commit: `git rev-parse HEAD`
- Config (relevant overrides): `GLANCE_RETRIEVAL__...`

## Logs / output

Paste the relevant log lines, stack trace, or `eval/results/summary.json` snippet.

## Anything else

Screenshots, related issues, or context.
